name: compliance fetch: /compliance-attest --revoke <framework-id> moves the attestation to compliance/attestations/_archived/ (per §2.19 license_handling field)
command:
mkdir -p compliance/attestations && printf "framework: iso-27001-a14
license_holder: X
license_expiry: 2027-01-01
" > compliance/attestations/iso-27001-a14.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/compliance-attest.sh" --revoke iso-27001-a14 && [ ! -f compliance/attestations/iso-27001-a14.yaml ] && [ -f compliance/attestations/_archived/iso-27001-a14.yaml ] && echo ok 1>&2
